hotels.title: Our Hotels
hotels.subtitle: Discover our properties in the Thuringian Forest – comfortable, close to nature, and with warm hospitality.
rooms.title: Our Best Rooms
rooms.intro: We offer you an unforgettable experience in our exclusive hotel – combined with comfort and design. Relax in modernly designed rooms.
rooms.emptyText: As soon as room data is available, it will appear here automatically from the API.
team.heading: Our Team
team.subtitle: Meet the people who make your stay special.
themes.title: Holiday Themes
themes.description: Would you like to leave everyday stress behind and relax in the Thuringian Forest? As a fan of fresh air and activity, do you appreciate untouched nature and varied exercise options? Find your holiday theme – we take care of the rest.
offers.title: Information on Offers
offers.subtitle: Packages and seasonal offers we have selected for you. You can check the details in the cards.
videoPromo.title: Watch Our Promotional Video
videoPromo.subtitle: A brief insight into the atmosphere, nature, and experiences at Werrapark Resort.
about.heroSubtitle: In the heart of the Thuringian Forest, we offer a nature-connected, guest-oriented experience.
about.missionText: To provide our guests with a quiet, warm, and safe environment and to strengthen sustainable tourism by preserving local culture and nature.
about.missionPoint3: Collaboration with the regional economy and local producers
about.valuesHospitalityText: Every guest is welcomed with genuine warmth.
about.valuesQualityText: Perfection in detail: Hygiene, comfort, and enjoyment.
about.valuesSustainabilityText: Energy and water efficiency, waste management, local sourcing.
about.timeline1Text: Foundation of the Werrapark brand laid.
about.timeline2Text: New rooms and wellness area added.
about.timeline3Text: Switch to online booking and modern CRM.
about.timeline4Text: Solar energy and waste reduction programs.
about.ctaTitle: We look forward to welcoming you
about.ctaText: If you have any questions, contact us – our team is happy to help.
offerDetail.intro: Discover the details of this offer and combine nature, comfort, and culinary moments in the Thuringian Forest.
offerDetail.service1: Overnight stay in a selected hotel of the Werrapark Resort
offerDetail.service2: Rich breakfast buffet with regional products
offerDetail.service3: Free use of pool and sauna area (depending on hotel)
offerDetail.service4: Diverse leisure activities in the Thuringian Forest
offerDetail.priceText: Send us your desired dates – we will check availability and create an individual offer.
roomDetail.bookingText: Would you like to book this room offer? Send your desired dates and we will get back to you with a suitable offer.
roomDetail.priceFallback: Price details will be added shortly. Contact us for an individual offer.
hotelDetail.requestText: Interested in this hotel? Write to us; we are happy to advise you on availability, room categories, and offers.
reviews.title: What Our Guests Say About Us
reviews.subtitle: Genuine voices from Werrapark Resort - transparent, warm, and directly from their stay.
reviews.heroSubtitle: Your feedback helps us improve our service. Feel free to share your thoughts with us.
reviews.formSubtitle: Please fill in the fields below to share your experience in detail.
contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: You can reach us through any desired channel. We look forward to your message.
contact.mapText: An interactive map with API data will be integrated here later.
contact.name: Name
contact.success: Thank you! Your message has been sent successfully.
contact.error: There was an error sending. Please try again later.
contact.validationEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
map.title: Werrapark Resort - In the Heart of Germany
map.subtitle: Discover us in the heart of the Thuringian Forest, surrounded by untouched nature.
giftVoucher.heroSubtitle: Choose the appropriate payment method and create your voucher in a few steps.
giftVoucher.introText: Whether a wellness break, a short holiday, or simply a special attention: With the Werrapark gift voucher, you give real experiences.
giftVoucher.brandText: The voucher is designed for Werrapark and can be connected directly to your payment providers later.
giftVoucher.methodsSubtitle: Depending on panel configuration, Stripe, PayPal, and SEPA are available separately.
giftVoucher.methodStripeDesc: Card, Apple Pay, or Google Pay via Stripe.
giftVoucher.methodPaypalDesc: Fast payment with your PayPal account.
giftVoucher.methodSepaDesc: Classic direct debit for direct withdrawal.
giftVoucher.notActivated: Currently not activated in the panel
giftVoucher.invoiceHint: You will receive the invoice after successful payment, not already on this overview page.
giftVoucher.apiFallback: Response invalid or unreachable. Please check BILLING and Tenant settings.
giftVoucher.checkoutSubtitle: Choose an amount or define your desired value.
giftVoucher.chooseAmountHint: You can choose a fixed voucher value or enter your own amount.
giftVoucher.cardSubtitle: A stylish voucher for stays, culinary moments, and small breaks in the Thuringian Forest.
giftVoucher.recipientHint: These details will appear later on the voucher or in the order summary.
giftVoucher.messagePlaceholder: Wishing you joy and relaxation for your birthday!
giftVoucher.summaryHint: Check amount, quantity, and payment method before the next step.
giftVoucher.stripePublicAvailable: A public Stripe key is stored in the panel.
giftVoucher.stripeUnavailableNote: Stripe is not yet fully configured in the panel.
giftVoucher.stripeIntegrationNote: The actual payment can then be connected via Stripe.js or Payment Element. The invoice appears after successful payment.
giftVoucher.paypalClientAvailable: A Client ID is stored in the panel.
giftVoucher.paypalUnavailableNote: PayPal is not yet fully configured in the panel.
giftVoucher.paypalIntegrationNote: PayPal Smart Buttons can be integrated here later. The invoice appears after successful payment.
giftVoucher.sepaUnavailableNote: SEPA is not yet fully configured in the panel.
giftVoucher.sepaIntegrationNote: Mandate data and direct debit can then be linked to your payment service provider. The invoice appears after successful payment.
giftVoucher.paymentUnavailable: This payment method is currently not available
giftVoucher.validationEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
giftVoucher.submitError: An error occurred while creating the invoice.
giftVoucher.invoiceCreatedSuccess: The invoice was successfully created and transferred to the panel.
giftVoucher.invoiceRedirectError: The invoice was created, but the invoice page could not be opened.
giftVoucher.invoicePageSubtitle: The purchase has been completed. Below you see the summary of the created invoice.
giftVoucher.invoiceNotFoundText: This invoice entry cannot be displayed at the moment.
giftVoucherPromo.title: Give Relaxation with Werrapark Gift Vouchers
giftVoucherPromo.description: Digitally in a few seconds or as a stylish voucher. Flexibly redeemable and ideal for birthdays, anniversaries, and special moments at Werrapark Resort.
cookie.title: Cookie Settings
cookie.text: We use necessary cookies for operation. Optional cookies enable analysis and WhatsApp communication.
whatsapp.heading: WhatsApp Support
whatsapp.text: Write to us directly – we will get back to you as soon as possible.
whatsapp.defaultMessage: Hello Werrapark team, I would like to make an inquiry.
